name: Trellix
description: Monitor Trellix ePO Cloud managed endpoints, security events, and device inventory

credentialFields.label: Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: Go to Trellix Developer Portal > Self Service > API Access Management. Request API access and copy the Client ID.

credentialFields.label: Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: Generated when requesting API access in the Trellix Developer Portal. Copy Client Secret immediately — it is only shown once.

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Trellix Developer Portal > Self Service > API Access Management section.

checks.name: Secure Devices
checks.description: Verifies that all Trellix ePO-managed endpoints are in a managed state with active agents

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Reviews recent Trellix ePO security events and threat detections to verify active monitoring

checks.name: Device List
checks.description: Provides a complete inventory of all Trellix ePO-managed devices with agent status and version information
